summary: M444 — Mobile combat panel hidden properly + key-drift audit. Mobile fix: every child of the active-actor card except the spell rail is now display:none, including the .ev-corner ornaments and .ev-panel__seal; card itself loses bg/border/padding/box-shadow/min-width/transition; .ev-hud__card-row padding+gap zeroed and .ev-hud padding-top zeroed. Only the spell rail remains visible. Key-drift audit (see memory/key-drift-audit-m444.md): scanned every registry reference; found 57 issues, fixed 53 at the source: '2h_sword' → 'sword2h' (9 occurrences), '2h_axe' → 'axe2h' (5), 'mace' → 'iron_mace' (4), warrior class.skills[0] 'shield_bash' → 'cleave', necromancer class.skills 'death_coil' → 'corpse_explosion'. KEY_ALIAS in DialogScreen extended for defensive backup ('mace' added; 'unarmed' explicitly skipped for monks). 49 outstanding orphan ids in build.preferredSkills[] are display-only and reported in the audit md for triage via the new Dialog Inspector tool.
